data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading rejects Diana Shipping's proposal for undervaluing Genco, lacking financing, and not benefitting shareholders.
data.description: In a unanimous decision, the board has concluded that the proposal undervalues Genco significantly, with considerable execution risks and lacks committed financing, ultimately not serving the best interests of shareholders.

data.title: L.A. Film School alumni win big at Golden Globes with key roles in most awarded projects, showcasing impact on industry.
data.description: Alumni from The Los Angeles Film School have made significant contributions to the entertainment industry, with a notable presence in the most awarded projects of the night. At the 83rd Golden Awards on Jan. 13, 2026, these alumni showcased their continued impact. Their involvement in key roles underscored their influence, highlighting the success of the school's graduates. The significant number of alumni involved in the night's acclaimed projects demonstrate the school's continued relevance and impact on the entertainment industry.
